overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic urban plaza at night during light rain. The character interacts with a weapon vending machine before exploring a circular bar area with holographic advertisements and other NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital displays

events.description: rain begins falling in the covered walkway, visible as streaks against the neon lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor, passing modern benches and illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera along the corridor

entered.detail: glass and metal ceiling structure with cyan neon trim
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying bright graphics
sleek seating with wooden tops and metal frames
transparent wall revealing the rainy city outside

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway with a glass ceiling, where rain begins to fall. Neon lights illuminate the polished marble floor, and digital billboards line the left wall while a glass facade reveals the rainy cityscape on the right.

events.description: character approaches and begins interacting with the Budget Arms vending machine touchscreen
vending machine display cycles through various weapon options and advertisements

agents.ego_description: approaching the vending machine and browsing weapon selections on the digital interface

entered.detail: black automated weapon dispenser with red accents and holographic pink gun display
tall warm-white illuminated fixture mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward a wall-mounted vending machine in a more enclosed alcove. The Budget Arms machine displays holographic weapons as the character interacts with the touchscreen, while vertical light fixtures illuminate the dark wall panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with circular bar and outdoor seating

events.description: character moves from the seating area to the circular illuminated bar counter
character briefly sits on a neon-lit bar stool before continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, circling the central bar and observing other patrons

notable_agents.action: seated at outdoor table under white umbrella
standing at the circular bar counter

entered.detail: large circular white counter with purple neon trim and a central tree growing through it
white canopy umbrellas shading purple neon-lit chairs
floating digital billboards displaying animated commercials above the plaza
large trees with distinctive red foliage growing through the structure

segments.scene_description: The character exits the alcove into an open plaza exposed to the rain, featuring a striking circular bar with neon purple accents and a central tree. Holographic advertisements float overhead as the character walks past outdoor seating areas with white umbrellas, briefly sitting at the bar before continuing to explore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pedestrian walkway into an open, rain-slicked futuristic plaza. It begins under a glass ceiling where neon lights reflect off polished marble floors and digital billboards line the path beside a rainy cityscape. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a more enclosed alcove where the camera focuses on a Budget Arms vending machine displaying holographic weapons against dark wall panels. The camera then follows the character as they exit the alcove and emerge into the open air, where the environment expands into a wide plaza featuring a circular bar with neon purple accents and a central tree. Finally, the shot glides past floating holographic advertisements and white outdoor umbrellas as the character briefly pauses at the bar before continuing their exploration.
